sections.title: Bug Fixes
entries: Paladin - Fixed issue with DQ sigil buff not working
Crusader - Fixed issue with cooldown reset not working properly with F
Keeper of the Grove - Fixed issue with item not granting pure attack speed bonus

subsections.name: Kamael, the Lightbringer
entries: Shackle HP 5 million -> 4.5 million
Sword of Judgment HP 19 million -> 18.5 million

subsections.name: Paladin
entries: DQ - (STR main stat) Skill damage amp on sigil 4% (8% for self) -> 2.5% (7.5% for self)

subsections.name: Priest
entries: E - Aura radius 900 -> 1200

notice: Summer Event is active starting this version; the event will run from June 10 to July 12. Refer to current-event for more information.

sections.title: Bug Fixes
entries: Kamael, the Lightbringer - Fixed an issue where material names were not displayed from the Loot Chest
Trickster - Illusion will now remain in combat as well if main hero is in combat
Trickster - Fixed a bug where crit-related effects did not proc on illusion's Q cast
Saint's Cloak - Fixed an issue where the death prevention effect would trigger before certain skill effects

subsections.name: Apocalypse Prime
entries: Shooter Specialty - E damage increase 60% -> 50%

subsections.name: Heaven's Fall
entries: Passive - Skill Damage increase 15%/10% -> 12%/8%

subsections.name: Bomb Backpack Series
entries: Bomb Throw - Damage STR x 7.5~8 -> STR x 7.5
Soul Bomb - Explosion Damage STR x 50~150 -> STR x 50~125

subsections.name: Eye of Truth
entries: Skill Damage 10% -> 12.5%
Passive - AD increase per stack 500 -> 750

subsections.name: Madness of Old Gods
entries: Crit Multiplier x0.10 -> x0.15
Passive - Bonus damage per proc 60000 -> 70000

subsections.name: Godslayer Signet
entries: Passive - AD increase 10500 -> 11000, Damage Amplification per stack when consuming marks 2% -> 3% (Maximum 14% -> 21%)

subsections.name: Gnosis-tier Bosses
entries: HP increase per player 35% -> 30%
Ancient Ent - Boss difficulty adjusted

subsections.name: Altheia-tier Bosses
entries: Death Fiend - Boss difficulty reduced
Nereid - Boss difficulty reduced

subsections.name: Duke Lazarus
entries: Shield break per tentacle hit 20% -> 30%

subsections.name: Gaia, the Earth Goddess
entries: Base HP 42.5 million -> 40 million

subsections.name: Arcane Construct
entries: Base HP 51 million -> 47.5 million
Orb of Purification HP 15 million -> 14 million

subsections.name: Styrix, the Harvester of Souls
entries: Base HP 80 million -> 72.5 million
(Phase 2) Soul Lantern HP 10~17.5 million -> 9~16.5 million

subsections.name: Kamael, the Lightbringer
entries: Base HP 90 million -> 85 million
Guardian Angel HP 9 million -> 8.5 million
Sword of Judgment HP 20 million -> 19 million

subsections.name: Fighter
entries: D - Maximum Combo Stacks 5 -> 4, AD per stack 10% -> 12%, Skill Damage 12% -> 15%, now displays stack
Q - SHATTERED chance (on failure) 50/75/100% -> 50/100%
T/F - Cast time reduced

subsections.name: Paladin
entries: DQ (Blessing) - When STR is the primary attribute, the Skill Damage increase effect is replaced with Skill Damage amplification of 4% (8% for self) (can stack with INT Paladin effects)
F - Cast time reduced

subsections.name: Dark Knight
entries: D - Soul consumption 3 -> 2, cast damage Main Stat x 7.5 -> Main Stat x 6, periodic damage Main Stat x 5 -> Main Stat x 4

subsections.name: Crusader
entries: W - All Stats increase 5% [Self 10%] -> Main Stat increase 4% [Self 8%] [Type-B]
E - Cast time reduced
R - Damage Taken increase 10% -> 6%

subsections.name: Knight
entries: R - Reduced time required to fire while an orb is summoned
T - Skill Damage amplification effect now also applies to self

subsections.name: Lancer
entries: Q - Damage Taken increase 5% -> 4%, debuff duration 15 sec -> 8 sec
R - Final Damage increase 20% -> 15%
T - Increase all stats of the hit ally by 8% for 40 sec -> Increase the hit ally's Main Stat by 6% for 15 sec [Type-B]

subsections.name: Sword Saint
entries: Q - Damage (STR + INT) x 10 -> (STR + INT) x 9
R - Damage per meteor (STR + INT) x 7.5 -> (STR + INT) x 6
T - Cast time reduced

subsections.name: Phantom Blade
entries: T - Duration 8 sec -> 6 sec, now amplifies skill damage by 12%, increases Q damage by 25%, reduces E cd from 3s to 2s
F - Cast time reduced

subsections.name: Swordsman
entries: D - Damage AD x 0.8 + AGI x 5 -> AD x 0.85 + AGI x 5
R - AGI increase per sword 1% -> 2%
T - Damage Taken increase 10% -> 6%

subsections.name: Martial Artist
entries: Q - Damage AGI x 5 -> AGI x 7.5

subsections.name: Assassin
entries: T - Damage AGI x 20 -> AGI x 25

subsections.name: Bow Master
entries: E - AD and Main Stat increase 5% -> 4%

subsections.name: Shooter
entries: Magitek Efficiency - Highest Elemental Efficiency x 80% -> 70%
E - Magic Damage Taken increase 5% -> 4% [Type-D]
T - Projectile Damage AD x 0.3 + Main Stat x 2.5 -> AD x 0.25 + Main Stat x 2

subsections.name: Sword Enchanter
entries: E - AD increase 20% -> 12% (20% for self)
R - Cooldown 20 sec -> 15 sec

subsections.name: Reaper
entries: E - Base Damage AGI x 10 -> AGI x 12.5, Cooldown 8 sec -> 6 sec

subsections.name: Gunner
entries: R - Base Damage AD x 75% -> AD x 80%

subsections.name: Trickster
entries: D - Illusion damage reduction 50% -> 40%
Q - Damage AD x 0.7 + AGI x 5 -> AD x 1 + AGI x 5
W - On attack, gain 2.5% AGI for 6 sec [Max 8 stacks] -> Changed to gain 8% AGI for 6 sec when casting a skill [Max 3 stacks]
T - Now also hits units around the target

subsections.name: Thunderer
entries: Magnetic Field - Maximum accumulation per second 10% -> 12%
R - Cast time reduced

subsections.name: Hermit
entries: D - (Harmony) Heal increase 100% -> 50%, increases Final Damage by 2.5% for 3 sec when healing allies [Water Affinity / Type-A]
Q - (Harmony) When empowered, target takes (4 + Main Stat / 1200)% increased damage for 3 sec [Type-C]
R - HP Regeneration -> Changed to Healing per second [can trigger healing effects], (without Harmony applied) Skill Damage increase effect -> Skill Damage amplification 4% (12% for self)
F - (Harmony) Grants debuff immunity while active

subsections.name: Blood Weaver
entries: Q - Blood natural regeneration per second 3 -> 4
E - Blood recovery on cast 40 -> 60

subsections.name: Mage (Fire)
entries: D - Time until Burn damage is applied 2.5 sec -> 2 sec
T - Damage per Meteor INT x 15 -> INT x 18, activation speed increased

subsections.name: Mage (Water)
entries: D - Maximum targets affected 3 -> 2
R - Cooldown 12 sec -> 10 sec
F - Cooldown 60 sec -> 75 sec

subsections.name: Mage (Arcane)
entries: F - Barrage Damage INT x 2 -> INT x 2.5, Q Combo Barrage Damage INT x 4 -> INT x 5

subsections.name: Mage (Lightning)
entries: WWW - Maximum stacks 5 -> 10

subsections.name: Mage (Wind)
entries: E - Damage reduction of healed allies increased by 10% -> Increase Primary Stat by (INT x 0.03), Damage Reduction increased by 8% [Wind Element / Type-C]
F - Slightly reduced the size of summon
FW - Mana is now consumed from the initial cast, on hit the target takes 4% increased magic damage for 4 sec [Type-D]

subsections.name: Warlock
entries: T - Soul Offering hotkey changed from F to T / Ultimate can now be used while transformed

subsections.name: Priest
entries: E - Removed All Stats increase effect, Attack Damage increase 5% -> 8% and now only applies within the aura range
TW - Similar to TQ, casting it on Nereid Bubble/Kamael Shackle, etc. will now automatically target an ally
F - Final Damage increase 5% -> 6%

subsections.name: Alchemist
entries: Q - Skill Damage amplification on Transmutation 8% -> 6%
RRQ - Magic Damage Taken increase 6% -> 4%
T - Final Damage increase 15% -> Changed to Skill Damage amplification 12%

subsections.name: Soul Weaver
entries: Q - Damage Taken increase (6 + INT / 800)% -> (5 + INT / 1000)%
W - Skill Damage increase (4 + INT / 375)% -> (6 + INT / 375)%
T - Cast time removed, added effect that restores HP equal to (INT x 2.5) to allies on the field when it expires, duration 6 sec -> 5 sec, cooldown 60 sec -> 45 sec

subsections.name: Shrine Priestess
entries: R - Affinity increase 12% -> 6%, Damage Reduction 20% -> 12%
T - Skill Damage amplification 20% -> 12%, D now also resets Mana when reset (activation coefficient 0.25)
F - Number of Fire Talismans created 3 -> 2

subsections.name: Witch
entries: E - Main Stat increase (4 + INT / 1000)% -> (INT x 0.06) [Type-C]

subsections.name: Elementalist
entries: WR - All Stats increase 10% -> Increase Main Stat by (INT x 0.06) [Type-C]
TE - Magic Damage Taken increase (5 + INT / 1000)% -> (4 + INT / 1200)%, debuff duration 8 sec -> 6 sec
FE - Damage INT x 125 -> INT x 175, 6 sec Damage Taken increase 6% -> pauses for 1.5s
